content: Crear services/external_sources/soccerstats.py: parser de table.asp?league=X&tid=s4/s5 (First/Second Half stats por equipo) + cache 24h por (team, league)
Crear services/derived_early_goal.py: deriva early_goal_pct/early_concede_pct desde recent_fixtures (API-Sports con minute por gol) como fuente complementaria sin scraping
Crear bulk pre-fetch async en analyst_engine.py: paralelo, timeout 30s, fail-soft, attached al team_context['seasonal_form']['early_goal_profile'] con data_quality
Wire al detector _detect_early_scoring_favourite en football_corner_pregame.py para leer del seasonal_form.early_goal_profile.early_goal_pct cuando exista
Tests: validar parsing real con BD + verificar shape de salida + fallback path cuando scraper falla
